ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Player's position (e.g., Wing, Guard, Center) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "jersey_number" TEXT /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "college" TEXT /* College of the player (if applicable) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team belongs to */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "home_venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's home venue */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "team_captain_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team captain */,
  "team_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "team_logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the team's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "commissioner" TEXT /* Name of the league commissioner */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* URL of the league's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first team playing */,
  "team2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second team playing */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "game_result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, tie) */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the game is played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance for the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "referee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the main referee */,
  "score_team1" INTEGER /* Score of the first team */,
  "score_team2" INTEGER /* Score of the second team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team2_id FOREIGN KEY ("team2_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_referee_id FOREIGN KEY ("referee_id") REFERENCES game_officials ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_team1_id FOREIGN KEY ("team1_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the season belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "regular_season_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "playoffs_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoffs_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  "highest_degree" TEXT /* Highest degree obtained by the coach */,
  "coaching_record" TEXT /* Coach's win-loss record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_coach_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach-game statistic */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the coach */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "win_loss" TEXT /* Win or loss for the coach */,
  "minutes_coached" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the coach was on the bench */,
  "technical_fouls" INTEGER /* Number of technical fouls */,
  "ejections" INTEGER /* Number of ejections */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_coach_stats_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_coach_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_officials" (
  "official_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each official */,
  "official_name" TEXT /* Full name of the official */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the official worked */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the official */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of officiating experience */,
  "certification_level" TEXT /* Official's certification level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("official_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_officials_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the venue is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the venue is located */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the venue was built */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full address of the venue */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the venue's official website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_venue_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game-venue statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance for the game */,
  "gate_revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated from ticket sales */,
  "highest_scoring_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team with the highest score */,
  "lowest_scoring_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team with the lowest score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_venue_stats_lowest_scoring_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("lowest_scoring_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_venue_stats_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_venue_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_venue_stats_highest_scoring_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("highest_scoring_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
